message:
🐛 fix: remove dangerous/wrong/non-installable CNCF install missions and fix placeholders (#1453)

- Delete 13 missions: wrong project (5), non-installable specs/libs (5), dangerous commands (3)
- Fix placeholder container images in 12 missions to use real registries
- Fix unofficial Helm repo URLs in 3 missions (akri, paralus, pipecd)
- Remove kubectl delete all --all from 2 uninstall steps (aeraki-mesh, envoy)
- Update index.json count from 1074 to 1061

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
